content: Yes, but the chance of getting it is very low. The standard chaos banner is the banner that has the largest pool of awakeners, so there is a possibility that you will get another awakener besides your favorite Hameln... I know you want to test your luck but it's also too risky so I suggest you just pull the Wheel instead of the awakener and wait for the hameln rerun banner
since im new if i login for 7 days i get the free standard flask for free so i plan on using it for that reason
The stardard selectors you get from the beginner login or from reset pyramids can't be used on former limiteds. Only standards.

Very weird question. Play what you are interested in. You need 1 main team for the story and 5 teams for end game mode.

You probably mean the wheel banner/equipment banner. It really depends on the character. Some will really want their special limited banner wheel, others will be fine or prefer using wheels from the standard banner.
Wheels? Depends on the character.
5 teams but i get  alot of pulls so i guess thats alright
I see so it depends  like who for an example?
Well, 5 teams, 8 wheels per team and you can't use the same awakeners/wheels after 1 fight, 5 fights total. Will take time for f2p.
Hm

Even with 5 teams, the endgame frontloads the rewards towards the easier difficulties. If you are going to sweat to try and get high scores in the endgame its more due to you enjoying that than fear of missing out on pull currency.
I see thats nice for me

Words <@510949582499217411> said are correct. Furthermore the reason you run Brown/R WoDs is because they give strong additional effects for Arc 1(Chapter 1-9)Storymode and Phan Dive. You will have to switch them up for Arc 2 rules(Chapter 10-12) in Events and D-Tide, as Brown/R Wheels strong additional effects get effectively “disabled”. In those moments, you want Crit Rate on Pandia/Horizon said what you want on Tawil/Nautila wants “Shield Amp”/Alva wants Death Resis or “Shield Amp”.
That should work for the early chapters.

Kath wants E3 to be “playable”, as for QoL of her unique stack mechanic, and having scaling. Castor works as a Shield/Support as a E0(so he is still playable”, and as a Shield/Support/DPS at E3. Inferno works at E3 for Poison Comps specifically. Anywhere else, you probably have better choices. At OE Inferno, she still wants to be in Poison Comps, but can be flexed into Aequor Tawil. At OE Inferno, she is mainly known for W3 A5 Faint+Inferno Cheese. Anywhere else, she isnt used as much… Her story Poison Team is expensive, and D-Tide, W3 only.
